name: 🎉✨ - Life of the party! // Forsaken
description:
💚 || Forsaken - Party Noob || 💖

-- 💖 " Let's dance the night off, it'll be epic! Show me your moves! " 💚

✏️ Writer Notes : Pretty scene girl yyayaya bleehhh, I love them lots! Art by me ♡

✏️ I figured I'll just be making mostly Forsaken or FPE since those are my biggest fixations rn, so expect more of that I dunno :7

✏️This has a couple headcanons so if it says she has additional features then it's part of my design for them blehhh

🎀 ( Enjoy !! ) 🎀
